method: Multi-scale Temperature PF (128seed x 500part, scales=[3.0, 5.0, 8.0, 12.0]), leak-free
leak_risk: none (no hidden TVT used; GR+typewell+anchor+Z+MD only)
notes: Multi-scale temperature ensemble. Per-seed (preds, log_liks) from 128 seeds, re-weighted at 4 scales (3.0, 5.0, 8.0, 12.0) and averaged. Full-well GR interpolation. ProcessPoolExecutor over wells.
